pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.7 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces, causing runtime failures or incompatibility with Jakarta EE 9+ libraries required by modern dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail to compile or run if the source/target compatibility is not set to the new JDK version, especially if new language features are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade springdoc-openapi version from 1.6.8 to 2.6.0 to match Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: springdoc-openapi 1.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (Jakarta EE), leading to classpath conflicts or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace legacy springdoc-openapi-ui, data-rest, and security dependencies with the unified starter-webmvc-ui artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifacts are removed in springdoc-openapi 2.x; using them results in missing class errors or dependency resolution failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency on jakarta.validation-api to ensure validation annotations are available.
pom.xml.why_exists: While often provided transitively, explicit declaration ensures the Jakarta EE 9+ validation API is present, preventing NoClassDefFoundError if transitive dependencies are excluded or vary.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Update import path for GroupedOpenApi to match the package structure in newer SpringDoc OpenAPI versions.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.why_exists: Class org.springdoc.core.GroupedOpenApi no longer exists in the updated library version; compilation fails with 'package does not exist' or 'cannot find symbol'.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Add import for the new Spring Security 6 Customizer utility required for the lambda-based configuration API.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol 'withDefaults' without the static import.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter inheritance with component-based configuration (implied by the migration comment and method changes).
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.why_exists: Compile error: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity configuration to use the new lambda DSL and requestMatchers instead of the deprecated authorizeRequests and antMatchers.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.why_exists: Compile error: authorizeRequests() and antMatchers() are removed in Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed from the classpath in Spring Boot 3.x (which requires Jakarta EE 9+), causing a compile error 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation namespace.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Ac.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Ac.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x uses jakarta.validation).

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Gl.general_idea: Migrate persistence API imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Gl.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' error.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Gl.general_idea: Update method signatures and return types to use HttpStatusCode instead of HttpStatus to match Spring Framework 6 API changes.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Gl.why_exists: Spring Framework 6 changes ResponseEntity and exception handler signatures to use HttpStatusCode; using HttpStatus causes compile errors due to type mismatch.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Gl.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation to utilize modern Java syntax.
